ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* SA2 code for geographic segmentation */,
  "sa2_name" TEXT /* SA2 name for geographic reference */,
  "dhb_residence" TEXT /* District Health Board of residence */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals at least partially vaccinated */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals fully vaccinated */,
  "eligible_booster" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for a booster */,
  "booster_received" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received a booster */,
  "partially_vaccinated_uptake" TEXT /* Percentage of partially vaccinated uptake */,
  "fully_vaccinated_uptake" TEXT /* Percentage of fully vaccinated uptake */,
  "booster_uptake" TEXT /* Percentage of booster uptake */,
  "date_of_data" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected or updated */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_sa2_code FOREIGN KEY ("sa2_code") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("sa2_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_partially_vaccinated FOREIGN KEY ("partially_vaccinated") REFERENCES vaccine_uptake ("total_administered"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("age_group"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_dhb_residence FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_residence") REFERENCES health_districts ("dhb_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_booster_received FOREIGN KEY ("booster_received") REFERENCES vaccine_uptake ("total_administered"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_fully_vaccinated FOREIGN KEY ("fully_vaccinated") REFERENCES vaccine_uptake ("total_administered")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic characteristics */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender information */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity information */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_districts" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health district */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the health district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the health district */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_types" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine type */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required to complete vaccination */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the vaccine */,
  "validity_period" INTEGER /* Validity period of the vaccine in months */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_uptake" (
  "uptake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uptake record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination campaign associated */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine used */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "total_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines administered in this demographic group during the campaign */,
  "uptake_date" TEXT /* Date when the uptake data was recorded */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "vaccine_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uptake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_uptake_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine being distributed */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health district receiving the vaccine */,
  "quantity_distributed" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vaccine distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of distribution */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution */,
  "stored_at" TEXT /* Storage location of the vaccine */,
  "distribution_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distributions_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccine_types ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distributions_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES health_districts ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "entity_accessed" TEXT /* Entity accessed (e.g., vaccination_data, vaccination_campaigns) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* More detailed information about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
